title: Index
description: An index chain — an LWW-Map folded via the canonical fold. Each operation's document carries an array of set/remove deltas over content-ref keys. The resolved index is the fold over ALL operations (every branch) in canonical order; the last delta touching a key wins.

deltas.description: Ordered deltas contributed by this operation. Applied in array order within the document, then across documents in canonical fold order.

key.description: Content ref — a 31-char content chain id or a CID.
Content ref to drop from the index.

entry.description: Optional entry metadata. A pure set-membership index uses the degenerate empty object {}. Unknown fields are preserved (forward compat).

order.description: Optional ordering hint (integer per the content number-encoding rule).
